caption: A man with long dark hair tied back and wearing glasses performs in front of a background of brown horizontal blinds. He is dressed in a white collared shirt under a dark vest decorated with blue embroidery, paired with a red and white patterned sash around his waist. He stands before a black microphone on a stand and holds a light-colored acoustic guitar, though only the top of the instrument is visible. In the foreground, the backs of the heads of several audience members are partially visible. The text "ORCA" appears in white letters on the right side of the scene. Across the sequence, the man remains in place, shifting his facial expression and slightly moving his head as he speaks or sings into the microphone. His posture and the surrounding environment remain constant throughout the clip.
